Beyond its flagship DEX trading platform, the ecosystem supports borrowing, lending, real world assets (RWAs), and a full-fledged Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), making it a leading force in decentralized finance (defi)."}}}},{"item":{"id":"siren-2","coin_id":54479,"name":"Siren","symbol":"SIREN","market_cap_rank":97,"thumb":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/54479/standard/siren.png?1739960056","small":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/54479/small/siren.png?1739960056","large":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/54479/large/siren.png?1739960056","slug":"siren-2","price_btc":1.0694452976778685e-05,"score":7,"data":{"price":0.7962359952895723,"price_btc":"0.00001069445297677868","price_change_percentage_24h":{"aed":2.1064824917048837,"ars":-0.13075071356695508,"aud":1.3527804602678126,"bch":-0.11199509562399991,"bdt":2.263754358750405,"bhd":2.2873591196285363,"bmd":2.1100968804656675,"bnb":-1.3851286061893584,"brl":1.9672366395783811,"btc":-2.638619406916683,"cad":1.5563108679946462,"chf":1.001130782118035,"clp":2.1614405946769044,"cny":1.8919224919077888,"czk":1.39497537412068,"dkk":1.4449490238191158,"dot":4.158967938149968,"eos":-0.4493282698641942,"eth":-5.432291127407813,"eur":1.4468583338137824,"gbp":1.2722899514959607,"gel":2.167567024211756,"hkd":2.102183616643368,"huf":0.23682920052639128,"idr":2.1735084056750993,"ils":2.488329040855418,"inr":2.137831642927784,"jpy":1.720771475523343,"krw":1.7215798775255715,"kwd":2.1468262979516,"lkr":2.1526869857337276,"ltc":1.1229290005278039,"mmk":2.110096880465671,"mxn":1.5476154928013401,"myr":1.6605555734447404,"ngn":2.122879158080753,"nok":1.2629062948381493,"nzd":1.3356146249913008,"php":1.2824267995181,"pkr":2.258640567293754,"pln":1.222528514132513,"rub":0.5959179678168607,"sar":2.238951434760421,"sek":0.4882999991999314,"sgd":1.8884819117995604,"sol":-3.028194765386181,"thb":1.4732081250755977,"try":2.103873819213058,"twd":1.6950484205733487,"uah":2.157837628176916,"usd":2.1100968804656675,"vef":2.1100968804656732,"vnd":2.083204573447397,"xag":-1.0605870061348184,"xau":1.0837436816766,"xdr":2.332978009665882,"xlm":-1.2898527392198802,"xrp":-1.069506993078549,"yfi":-0.8905849034736729
